title: 拆卸 API（按UUID/随机/按种类/全部，UninstallResult，force/returnItems 参数）
reference_files: C:\Users\GGxia\Desktop\YanbweMod\ModularShoot\设计文档.md (lines 511-546: 拆卸API与参数说明)
C:\Users\GGxia\Desktop\YanbweMod\ModularShoot\设计文档.md (lines 538-545: 定位方式说明与UninstallResult)
acceptance_criteria: uninstallPlugin(ItemStack gun, UUID instanceUuid, Player player, boolean force, boolean returnItems) 方法实现
uninstallRandomPlugin(ItemStack gun, Player player, boolean force, boolean returnItems) 方法实现
uninstallPluginsByType(ItemStack gun, Player player, ResourceLocation pluginTypeId, boolean force, boolean returnItems) 方法实现
uninstallAllPlugins(ItemStack gun, Player player, boolean force, boolean returnItems) 方法实现
所有拆卸按 instanceUuid 定位（不用列表索引，防索引漂移）
force=true 时强制拆卸（忽略 locked 标记），force=false 时跳过 locked 插件
returnItems=true 且 player!=null 时返还插件物品到玩家物品栏（满则掉落），否则直接删除
拆卸后调用 AttributeModifierService.recalculateModifiers 刷新 ATTRIBUTE_MODIFIERS
拆卸前触发 PrePluginUninstallEvent（可取消），拆卸后触发 PostPluginUninstallEvent
批量拆卸时 PrePluginUninstallEvent 被取消的插件跳过，继续处理下一个
